message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classBoxStyle shadow
skinparam classStyle bgLight

actor Main
participant Print
participant PrintBanner
participant Banner

Main "C" uses Print
Print "I" has interface
PrintBanner "C" has class
Banner "C" has class

PrintBanner "C" : void printWeak()
PrintBanner "C" : void printStrong()

Print "I" : void printWeak()
Print "I" : void printStrong()

Banner "C" : void showWithParen()
Banner "C" : void showWithAster()

PrintBanner "C" ..> Print "I" : Uses
Banner "C" ..> PrintBanner "C" : Uses

@enduml
